---
title: "Charlotte Jones"
---

## Charlotte Jones

**Dates:** (1784-1836)

**Maiden name:** (Yonge)

### Description

aunt and godmother of CMY

### Biography

Elder sister of WCY, she married first (August 1806), her first cousin Captain George Crawley (1781-1810) and had children (LG says only Georgina (Crawley) Polson, but Guildhall Library  HH Gibbs MSS mentions another, confirmed by census, who may have died).  She married secondly (1825), the Rev. John Collier Jones (1760-1838).

### Letters

- Letter from Decr 1st [or 14?] [1883]
- Letter from Novr 28th [1865?][[footnote:1]]
- Letter from July 4, 1834

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
